nation: Fond du Lac Denesuline First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation operates government business enterprises including FDLFNDLP (development/investments), FDLFNDC, Waterfound Development LP and Corp. Portfolio investments include CanAlaska Uranium Ltd shares (fair value $216,000), PADC (8.33%), and PAFNBDLP (8.25%). Three operating lines of credit with First Nations Bank totalling $425,000. Guarantee issued for FDLFNDLP demand loans of $401,290 with First Nations Bank.
notes: Audit qualified due to missing budget comparatives (no effect on actual figures). Financial statements dated March 31, 2021 but signed November 2024 - significantly late filing. OSR is negative because deferred revenue recognition timing creates large negative adjustment (-$11.2M current period deferral vs +$3.8M prior year recognition). Three subsidiaries fully consolidated: Fond du Lac Mineral Resources Inc, Fond du Lac Power Corporation, Fond du Lac Hydro Inc. Four GBEs on modified equity basis: FDLFNDLP, FDLFNDC, Waterfound Development LP, Waterfound Development Corp. Fond du Lac Specific Claim Trust excluded as controlled by independent Trustees. Prior year figures are restated. CMHC mortgages totalling $1,239,498 included in long-term debt figure shown. Due from related party of $1,817,055 represents unexpended housing and renovation funds held by FDLFNDLP.
